column1: Hey Alexei, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
okay cool yea thats where I'll be this spring too!
how many ppl in your group so far?
thats solid! you all from the same school?
oh bet, I went to Salve lol. will def hook it up for y'all
gonna put the info together for you rn. how soon were you lookin to get started?
Oh shit bro that's mad close
Idk In the next few weeks
We got plenty of time I figure
word yea things are moving a little quickly now so I'll send it all over and we'll go from there
cool if I send through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over lmk if you got it. I can hook it up with a discount on the prices you see there too
Are these like the prices for the 4 days?
yea the total 4 days. with everything included except flights
ill be at the occidental punta cana and can hook it up for $599. the resort is a lot nicer than the caribe when it comes to amenities
Bet can you send me the info on that for $599
And I'll forward it to them
Is that 4 guys per room for $599
Wait is it $599 for a 4 man room
When would we need to book by
Also is there a club at the resort?
yea theres a club called mangu, we bring our DJs in there. its a small club get pretty hot but its pretty lit bro lol
and rn to lock in the 599 price we'd have to deposit very soon. within the next few days. and we can stretch the payment plan out so that you have some time through the holidays to pay it off
the deposit is only $100 to get the price locked in and spots reserved
the deposit is only $100 to get the price locked in and spots reserved. flights we can look at but tbh its cheaper to get those separately on your own
fly out of boston? prolly cheapest
we wanna do 4 nights or 5 nights?
actually nvm we were looking at the 4 deal, forgot
aight bro I found a pretty good flight y'all can jump on on your own and save $
you'll want to do it through Jet Blue tho rather than google
yea thats a steal bro, + your 599 package that $1,005 for an all inclusive spring break
rooms are spacious too at this resort
How do we do the down payment
yoo waddup bro. I'll send the reservation over so y'all can slot in. you'll each hop on, join a room slot, add your details, and make the deposit on your own accounts
then each time you want to update anything or make the next payment youre able to log in and do so
yea I got you in the am fs
You can send it now lowkey if you want, but most guys will Do it tmr
yo ima text you from my imessage too so you have it. easier to communicate that way
yoyo its Spiffy on my work line. text me here if you have any questions about spring break coming up. that way if Im on travels our team can help you out still
gonna be moving around a lot soon
yoooooo brodie whats good its Spiffy
Did you see my text on ur other phone?
I mustve missed it my fault bro. everything aight?
Yeah I was just asking about that discount you mentioned
Since I got those 4 girls to book
oh word yea I got you bro. remind me the name of one of the other girls? gonna look at their reservation
Rest are Olivia, Abbie, and Daniele
bett they all lookin good bro. I'm able to get you in on our rep program for the free stay
Betttt so I'll get a refund on my car or whatt
Yessir I'll let you know when that's processed
Loved “Yessir I'll let you know when that's processed”
yerr whenever you get a sec, if you could have everyone enter their flight info, that was we can set up your airport transfers
I told everyone to rip that, I just put mine in now too
Does the -535 mean it's pending back? Do you know what account it's going to?
yea it'll go back to the card you used for the original payments
yerrr brodie is Thomas on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
He should be yes, we are all On same one
bet he didnt add it in but I'll add it rn
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets? you have the booze cruise event so far
your booze cruise will be either the 15th or 16th. they schedule it when you arrive
and then the other events are Sunday March 15 - Coco Bongo Monday March 16 - Pearl Beach Club Tuesday March 17 - Imagine Cave
Bet I'll ask the guys and lyk
heres the Imagine Cave vibe https://youtu.be/RXvcdVqvARU
Yo so we just called the resort and they said they only have our room for 3 days
got you here for the 13th to 17th
Can you call them and see what's up with that? She seemed confused but she said our reservation was only 3 nights the 13-16
That's what we had too, what should we do?
which room did you ask about when you called
Mine I told them my name
do you know who you spoke to?
Not sure I just called the hotel and then they transferred me to some woman
She lowkey didn't seem like she understood, she told me to call back in a hour when a manager is there
yea bro she def didnt understand lol
Im here now, everything will be fine we havent had any issues with our reservations
Okay I'll call back in a hour and see what's up
we have 4-6 on site staff members ready to help you when you arrive
Sounds good bro I'll keep You in the loop
Was there a reason you wanted to call the resort?
Just confirmed your reservation is til the 17th on resort file as well
We just wanted to make sure things were all set
OK perfect thank you for checking
We just landed, we outside we don't see our transport
How far out did you walk? There's a big Go Blue Tours booth on your right you can't miss jt
Okay they said it's coming in 5 mins
Okay bet. I let ops team know on my end too
Bet. safe ride to the resort fam, Taylor will be in the lobby to help y'all with check in and stuff
Yo do you know when our shuttle back to the airport is?
Our flight got delayed so will the shuttle be delayed too
Yoyo, shuttle time typically stays the same
How much of a delay was it
Word yessir glad it all worked out
It ended up changing flights mine now leaves at 430
So 4 of us need a shuttle at 10, 1 guy in our group already had at 10am shuttle booked can we hop on that
Yea you should be good for that if it's now 4:30
Lmk when you in lobby bro ill come say what's up
We already boutta dip they said they have no shuttle for us at 10
Aight brodie. Link me in Newport soon bro lmk when you sliding out there
Yessir dawg def will make that happen
Newport is smooth bro, you'll def like it
Get back safe today tho. Glad yall had a good week
